title: Integrations
subtitle: Connect CloseFlow with external tools. Enable, configure and manage integrations without touching code.

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.description: Collect subscription payments for your plans via Stripe Checkout.
stripe.publishableKeyHint: Starts with pk_test_ or pk_live_. Safe to expose.
stripe.successUrlHint: Where to send the customer after a successful payment.
stripe.cancelUrlHint: Where to send the customer if they cancel.
stripe.secretWarning: The secret key (sk_...) and webhook secret (whsec_...) are NOT stored in the database. Save them in Lovable Cloud → Secrets as STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
stripe.productMappingHint: For each paid plan, paste the Price ID created in Stripe (price_...).

guide.title: Step-by-step
guide.step1: Go to stripe.com/register and finish your business onboarding.
guide.step2: In the Stripe dashboard, go to Developers → API keys. Copy the Publishable key and Secret key. Use test keys (pk_test_/sk_test_) first.
guide.step3: Fill in the Publishable key field on this card and save.
guide.step4Title: 4. Add the Secret key as a secret
guide.step4: Click "Add secret" and register STRIPE_SECRET_KEY with your sk_test_ or sk_live_.
guide.step5Title: 5. Create products and prices in Stripe
guide.step5: In Stripe, go to Products → Add product. For each plan you charge for in CloseFlow, create a product with the equivalent recurring price. Copy the Price ID (starts with price_) and paste it in the plan mapping below.
guide.step6: In Stripe, go to Developers → Webhooks → Add endpoint. Paste the webhook URL shown below. Select the checkout.session.completed event. Copy the Signing secret (whsec_...) and register it as STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET in secrets.
guide.step7: Run a test purchase with card 4242 4242 4242 4242. When everything works, switch to live keys and change the environment to Live.

messages.missingConfig: Configure the publishable key and plan mapping before testing.

whatsapp.name: WhatsApp Business
whatsapp.description: Send proposals and notify status changes directly to your client's WhatsApp.

resend.name: Email (Resend)
resend.description: Send proposals by email with templates, validity reminders and acceptance notifications.

pix.name: Pix / Mercado Pago
pix.description: Local alternative to Stripe for collecting subscription or proposal payments.

calendar.name: Google Calendar
calendar.description: Automatically schedule a meeting when a proposal is accepted.

sheets.name: Google Sheets / Notion
sheets.description: Export your proposal pipeline to spreadsheets or Notion databases.

zapier.name: Zapier / Make
zapier.description: Generic outbound webhook to integrate with any tool.
